authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(102) — Newlands Lake tributaries (Lassen Co.)
sources.quotedText: (102) Newlands Lake tributaries (Lassen Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Reservoir layer record for gaz_id 229518, "Newland Reservoir", Reservoir, Lassen County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":229518,"gaz_name":"Newland Reservoir","gaz_featureclass":"Reservoir","fcode":39004,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Lassen"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13367785.1796, 5026183.3330) converts to lon -120.084857, lat 41.093775, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-120.0846, 41.0938) to within ~25m. This reservoir record is used as the anchor coordinate for these tributary mouths, since 'Newlands Lake tributaries' (as named in 14 CCR §7.50(b)(102)) has no standalone GNIS entry of its own.

parameters.note: This entry, listed by CDFW as 'Newlands Lake tributaries', is understood to refer to the tributary streams feeding Newland Reservoir, a 59-acre reservoir in Lassen County (the GNIS-official name differs slightly from the regulation's naming convention). The tributaries are closed to all fishing all year; this entry does not itself regulate the reservoir.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Newlands Lake tributaries (Lassen Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. (Note: this water is closed to all fishing all year; license requirement is noted for statewide consistency only.)

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
